basis.target_market: Serious retail traders, explicitly built for ICT / Smart Money Concept (SMC) practitioners from day one. Global, English-first.
basis.pricing_model: Freemium-ish. 1 month free, no credit card required. Paid upgrade with 7-day trial. Specific monthly $ tiers not publicly listed in search results [uncertain].

ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade (full access to every logged trade), per-period (session, day, week patterns via color-coded calendar), per-playbook (named strategy models tracked separately), per-portfolio (full journal context for Coach Q&A).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Primarily pull — 'Ask MRT AI Coach' Q&A interface with full journal context. Some scheduled/visual surfacing via calendar heatmaps; conversational coaching is the main flow. [uncertain on push-alerts]
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: Not disclosed; ICT/SMC framework needs several trades per setup-type for meaningful per-strategy performance [uncertain].
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Claude (Anthropic) — explicitly marketed: 'get personalized AI coaching from Claude'. Specific Claude model (Sonnet/Opus) not stated [uncertain].
ai_features.output_format: Conversational chat with Coach (text), color-coded calendar heatmap, mistake-type breakdowns (dollar cost + frequency), strategy model performance reports. Can analyze chart screenshots (multimodal).
ai_features.notable_prompts: Marketed example questions for the Coach: 'what's killing my P&L?', 'which session should I cut?', 'analyze this chart screenshot'. Coach has full access to every trade ever logged. ICT/SMC log fields: grade, session, bias, confluences, mistakes, chart screenshots.

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: structured-rules (leaning toward rule-adherence-scored). Named strategy models tracked separately with live performance per model. Each trade logs grade, session, bias, confluences, mistakes. Mistake-tracking with dollar cost per mistake type. Pre-built ICT/SMC tagging is the structured backbone.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Yes at setup-level — 'create named strategy models and track their live performance separately, seeing which model wins, which session it performs in, and how each evolves over time'. The Coach can answer per-strategy questions. ICT/SMC-native log fields (grade, session, bias, confluences) make setup-cohort reasoning the default.
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Implicit via mistake-tagging + clean-vs-mistake P&L split. Auto-calculates 'clean vs mistake P&L' as a discipline metric. Specific named 'rule adherence %' not headlined the way RizeTrade does it, but mistake-cost is quantified. [uncertain on whether full compliance % surfaces]
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not explicitly advertised as a pre-entry AI pressure-test. Coach is mostly post-trade and on-demand analysis. [uncertain]
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: ICT/SMC concepts ship as first-class log fields (grade, session, bias, confluences, mistakes). User creates named strategy models on top. No big template library of canned third-party setups advertised. [uncertain]

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted only — Claude is called server-side by MRT. No bring-your-own-key documented in search results. [uncertain]
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: Free tier (1 month free, no CC) and paid tier (7-day trial). Specific paid $ amount not in public search results [uncertain]. AI included in plan.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Crypto exchange support not explicitly named in available search results. ICT/SMC framework is asset-agnostic and used heavily in crypto, but specific Hyperliquid/Blofin/MEXC integrations not confirmed. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Asset-agnostic given ICT/SMC focus (typically forex + crypto). Specific named markets not exhaustively listed in search results [uncertain].
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Not explicitly advertised. Detailed per-trade logging (grade, session, bias, confluences) suggests structured execution-modeling. [uncertain]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Yes — 'session performance' is auto-calculated alongside expectancy, profit-factor, performance-by-grade, direction-split, clean-vs-mistake P&L. Combined with named-strategy-models, the per-setup × session view is core to the data model. Whether the AI Coach auto-renders 'BOS+FVG London vs NY' as a one-click report is not explicit, but the data substrate is there.

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis. Mistake-tagging by type (psychology, execution, market read, risk) with dollar-cost-per-mistake-type, plus Claude-powered Coach with full journal context plus chart-screenshot multimodal analysis. Among the deepest coaching loops in this batch.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Mistake categories (psychology / execution / market read / risk), clean-vs-mistake P&L, grade per trade, session performance, color-coded calendar (best/worst days, weekly patterns). Specific named tags (Tiltmeter, revenge-detection) not headlined but mistake-typing is granular.

community.changelog_ai_velocity: Recent product (2024-2026), actively shipping. Specific dated changelog cadence not in public search results [uncertain].
